description.content: User login and session management
Authenticates a user and creates an API session token. The token must be included in all subsequent API requests.
Logs out the user and invalidates the current session token.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Host configuration and management
Returns a list of hosts matching the given parameters. Supports filtering by host name, group, template, IP, and many other criteria.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Creates one or more new hosts in Zabbix.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Updates an existing host in Zabbix.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Deletes hosts from Zabbix by host ID.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Host group management
Returns a list of host groups based on the given parameters.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Creates one or more new host groups in Zabbix.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Monitoring item configuration
Returns a list of monitoring items based on the given parameters.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Creates new monitoring items on a host.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Trigger configuration and management
Returns a list of triggers based on the given parameters.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Creates new monitoring triggers.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Event retrieval and acknowledgement
Returns events based on the given parameters, including alerts and triggers.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Acknowledges one or more events and optionally adds a message.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Action configuration for alerting and automation
Returns action configurations from Zabbix.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Creates new actions for alerting or automated command execution.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
User account management
Returns a list of users matching the given parameters.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Creates new Zabbix user accounts.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Active problem retrieval
Returns active problems currently affecting monitored hosts.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Historical monitoring data
Returns historical monitoring data for items over a time range.
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Your Zabbix server hostname

The Zabbix API is a JSON-RPC 2.0 HTTP API for programmatically retrieving and modifying the configuration of Zabbix and accessing historical monitoring data. The API is shipped as part of the Zabbix web frontend and accessible at /zabbix/api_jsonrpc.php.

Contact Support:
